human_verification.notes: Reviewed manifest, authority sources, research summary, functionality map, evaluation scenarios, results, deployment notes, marketing notes, and release readiness for issue #1625.

trusted_build_claim.reason: Issue #1625 requires specification-based posture unless a separate frequent-use promotion is documented; no such evidence exists in this package.

notes: Spec pack is the canonical source of truth for future materialization.
Functionality coverage is complete for shared abilities, quality-safety-and-assurance abilities, and professional-and-information-services abilities.

Evaluation scenarios cover release process design, versioning and tagging, review, control verification, incident handling, artifact integrity, hold/release boundaries, rollback readiness, corrective action, confidentiality, signoff refusal, adjacent routing, low confidence, conflicting policy, tenant adaptation, and no unreviewed regressions.
Structured readiness evidence supports a validated claim without asserting a retained implementation.
